prompt:
A pocket-sized digital pH meter displayed on a clean hydroponics work surface beside small calibration solution cups and a rinse container. The slim handheld probe has a compact digital display area, protective cap, and practical lab-ready form factor, making it clearly identifiable as a reusable pH measurement instrument rather than a disposable strip. The setup should suggest accuracy and routine calibration for nutrient solution work.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future hydroponics lab aesthetic: soft bench lighting, realistic plastic and glass textures, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the meter centered with a tidy composition so it reads instantly as a digital pH tool.
